code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut last_byte = -1
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(b)
      last_byte = b
      if b == 10
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      last_byte = last_byte
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if n > 0 and last_byte != 10
    count = count + 1
  end
  print("lines=#{count}")
end
